channel.title: Transcripts: Prof G Pod (Scott Galloway)
channel.description: YouTube video transcripts from Prof G Pod (Scott Galloway)

item.title: Trump CRASHES OUT at the NATO Summit
item.description:
Join Jessica LIVE with @briantylercohen Thursday 7/9 at 11:45AM ET: https://links.profgmedia.com/btclive
Jessica Tarlov and Aaron Parnas (@aaronparnas1) break down a packed and alarming news day, starting with the collapse of the Iran-U.S. ceasefire. Oil prices have spiked to their highest level in weeks, and the IMF is now warning of a sharp global economic slowdown.
At the NATO Summit in Turkey, Trump called European allies "hopeless," seemed to confuse Zelensky with Putin, and made eyebrow-raising remarks about Japan. He did, however, announce that the U.S. will allow Ukraine to manufacture the Patriot air defense system domestically — a significant development in the ongoing Russia-Ukraine war.
Back home, the clock is ticking on the Maine Senate race. Bernie Sanders has now personally called Graham Platner urging him to step aside following sexual assault allegations, and Democratic pressure is intensifying. They talk about who could replace him, and what the Texas race is looking like.
Several Republican leaders say they spoke with the hospitalized Kentucky senator Mitch McConnell yesterday, and Governor Andy Beshear has sent a formal letter to McConnell's office requesting a health update.
Plus: The Justice Department has sent letters to election officials in all 50 states and D.C. threatening prosecution for failing to purge non-citizens from voter rolls. And the Trump administration has also been quietly rolling back gun violence prevention programs across the CDC, DHS, and DOJ.
Finally, the preliminary hearing in the Charlie Kirk murder case is underway in Utah, with prosecutors claiming a mountain of evidence against alleged assassin Tyler Robinson and seeking the death penalty.
Get your ticket for our live show at 92NY: https://www.92ny.org/event/scott-galloway-and-jessica-tarlov
#trump #uspolitics #politics #aaronparnas #jessicatarlov #republicans #gop #republicanparty #democrats #democraticparty #livestream #mitchmcconnell #iran #nato #otan #turkey #natosummit #maine #grahamplatner #susancollins #janetmills #troyjackson #texas #jamestalarico #kenpaxton #andybeshear #kentucky #doj #electionsecurity #electionsafety #2026midtermelections #charliekirk #tylerrobinson
To see Raging Perspective LIVE, and to get ad-free episodes of Raging Moderates and all the other Prof G shows: join ProfG+ on Substack: https://ragingmoderates.profgmedia.com/ Get The Monday Rage newsletter: https://profgmedia.com/s/monday-rage/
Follow Jessica Tarlov on Instagram, Substack, and Bluesky: https://instagram.com/jessicatarlov https://substack.com/@jessietarlov https://bsky.app/profile/jessicatarlov.bsky.social
Follow Aaron Parnas on Substack, TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube: https://aaronparnas.substack.com/ https://www.tiktok.com/@aaronparnas1/ https://instagram.com/aaronparnas/ https://www.youtube.com/@aaronparnas1
Follow Raging Moderates on IG, Tiktok, and Facebook: https://www.instagram.com/ragingmoderatespod/ https://www.tiktok.com/@ragingmoderates https://www.facebook.com/ragingmoderates
Subscribe to our YouTube Channel: https://www.youtube.com/@RagingModerates
